trigger: POST /api/user/login with valid credentials
POST /api/user/login with wrong password
note: After 5 failures the same user triggers UserLockedOut

trigger: FailedLoginCount > _FAILED_LOCK_COUNT (5) — next login attempt with delay check
POST /api/user/resetfailedloginandunlock by admin
MSAL ACQUIRE_TOKEN_SUCCESS or LOGIN_SUCCESS event, followed by POST /api/user/loginad
side_effects: LocalStorage: adLogin = '1' set for silent SSO
Same token issuance as standard login

trigger: Login returns HTTP 428 (2FA required) or user explicitly requests
side_effects: PIN sent to user's mobile or email; no DB write for the PIN itself (in-memory or short-lived)
note: authenticatorApp method needs no code dispatch — user reads from app

trigger: POST /api/user/twofactor with valid pin or authenticator code
side_effects: Full access token + refresh token issued — same as standard login

trigger: Login returns HTTP 300 (must select profile) and user picks a profile
side_effects: New access token issued with profileId claim

trigger: GET /api/user/refreshaccesstoken?refreshToken=...
POST /api/user/logout
side_effects: JWT access token continues until natural expiry (not invalidated server-side)
note: Gap: no server-side JWT revocation — access token remains valid up to 15 min after logout

trigger: User clicks 'Forgot password' in BiLoginComponent and submits email
side_effects: Email dispatched with reset link containing token

trigger: User submits new password with valid PasswordResetToken link
side_effects: User.Password updated to hash of new password

trigger: POST /api/user/confirmauthenticatorapp with valid TOTP code
Admin/SuperAdmin triggers impersonation of another user
side_effects: New access token issued with impersonated user's claims and impersonateFromUserId claim

trigger: Admin cancels impersonation
side_effects: Access token re-issued for original admin identity

trigger: Admin creates a new user (POST /api/user or via SCIM provisioning)
PATCH /api/user/updateuser with UpdateUserCommand
side_effects: User entity fields updated: Name, Email, PhoneNumber, LanguageId, TimeZoneId, TestMode, ReceiveNewsletter
note: Bug in current code: returns BadRequest even on valid input if outer null check passes but inner block fails

trigger: DELETE /api/user?id={id} by admin
POST /api/user/reactivateuser?id={id} by admin
First-time SAML SSO login by a user not yet in the system
UserNudgingService detects a pending nudge for user post-login
side_effects: Modal or banner shown in UI after login redirect
note: NudgeType values not fully mapped — see GAP_005. Injected into BiLoginComponent as UserNudgingService.

trigger: See UserUpdated event — this is the command DTO, not a separate event
note: Legacy entry from old pipeline scan. Superseded by UserUpdated event above.
